creator: trasz@pin.if.uz.zgora.pl
text:
On 0305T0740, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/fusefs-encfs,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/109899 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/109899

It's ok, i approve it.

-- 
If you cut off my head, what would I say?  Me and my head, or me and my body?
